constraint_evolution.constraint: Year range 2023-2025, any readable table format
Year range 2024-2025, output must be CSV
Topic must be BOTH reinforcement learning and memory agents
Source C (old README): output filename memory_rl.tsv

arbitration_rationale.conflict_resolution_rule: Latest explicit user constraints supersede stale memo/cache artifacts
arbitration_rationale.year_range_decision: Accepted 2024-2025 only, rejected 2023 inclusion from internal memo
arbitration_rationale.format_decision: Accepted CSV requirement, rejected old README TSV suggestion
arbitration_rationale.filename_decision: Accepted arxiv_memory_rl.csv, rejected memory_rl.tsv from old README

final_constraints.topic_filter: Both reinforcement learning AND memory agents required
